docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR FEB-10-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (610)
ORDER GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER CONTINUING TRIAL DATE AND RELATED DEADLINES (COPY IN DEPT. 206 OUTBOX)
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-26-2020 - CASE SETTLED. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON JUL-14-2020 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF KARIM NURANI'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. MATTER CALLED, DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF KARIM NURANI'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT WEARABLE WORLD, INC. DOES NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION SUBSTANTIVELY, STATING ONLY THAT IT MAY FILE A BANKRUPTCY PETITION AT SOME UNCERTAIN FUTURE DATE. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM. (302/RBU)

LEIDER TO WITHDRAW AS ATTORNEY IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support;Declaration Of Andrew Quan; Exhibits A-B
Off Calendar Mar-26-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Andrew Quan, Esq. of the Law Offices of Andrew Quan, 510.394.2466, appearing for the Plaintiff and Cross-Defendant;
Atty. Joren Ayala-Bass, Esq. of Leider + Ayala-Bass LLP, 415,293.8245, appearing for Defendant/Cross-Complaintant Wearable World Inc.;
Atty. Philip Leider, Esq. of Leider + Ayala-Bass LLP, 415,293.8245, appearing for Defendant/Cross-Complaintant Wearable World Inc.

PLAINTIFF KARIM NURANI's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement.

Matter called, DISCUSSIONS are held. At the conclusion of discussions, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Plaintiff Karim Nurani's motion to enforce settlement agreement is granted. Defendant Wearable World, Inc. does not oppose the motion substantively, stating only that it may file a bankruptcy petition at some uncertain future date.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)

DEFENDANT WEARABLE WORLD, INC.'s Motion Of Philip A. Leider To Withdraw As Attorney.

Matter called. The Court states that it will speak in camera with Attorney Joren Ayala-Bass in chambers at 10:45 a.m. this morning. The chambers phone number was provided to Attorney Joren Ayala-Bass in open court. This matter is passed until 10:45 a.m.

IN CAMERA DISCUSSIONS are held, At the conclusion of the in camera discussions, DEFENDANT WEARABLE WORLD, INC.'s Motion Of Philip A. Leider To Withdraw As Attorney is GRANTED.

Order signed.
